name: Pi-Independent IDE Polish
description: Build all UI infrastructure and Rust services that don't require Pi running. Command Palette, Settings panel with API key management, diff preview in approvals, git status, and markdown rendering in chat. Makes Tide feel like a real IDE.
notes: All tasks in this phase can be built without Pi available.
Command Palette is foundational — other features register commands into it.
API keys stored in macOS Keychain via security-framework crate.
Git integration via git2 crate (native, no shell commands).
Markdown rendering replaces raw <pre> text in agent chat output.

tasks.title: Build Command Palette
tasks.description: Cmd+Shift+P overlay with fuzzy search. Zustand command registry store (commandStore.ts) with register/unregister/open/close. Fuzzy match utility (fuzzyMatch.ts). Categories: File, View, Settings. Initial commands: Open Folder, Toggle File Tree, Open Settings, Focus Editor, Focus Agent, Close Tab. Keyboard: ArrowUp/Down navigate, Enter executes, Escape closes.

tasks.title: Build Settings Panel + API Key Management
tasks.description: Settings modal (640px, 80vh) with sidebar nav (Providers, Safety, Skills). Rust keychain.rs using security-framework crate for macOS Keychain. 4 Tauri commands: keychain_set_key, keychain_get_key, keychain_delete_key, keychain_has_key. TypeScript wrappers in keychain.ts. ProviderSettings.tsx shows cards per provider (Anthropic, OpenAI, Google) with status badges, password input for editing, never displays actual keys.

tasks.title: Add Diff Preview to Approval Dialog
tasks.description: Enhance ApprovalDialog to render DiffPreview component when the approval payload includes originalContent and newContent fields. Extend ApprovalRequest type in approvalStore.ts. DiffPreview.tsx already exists — wire it into the approval flow. Mock data for testing; actual file content will be provided by tide-safety.ts in Phase 6.

tasks.title: Add Git Status to Status Bar
tasks.description: New Rust module git.rs using git2 crate. Tauri commands: git_status (returns changed/staged/untracked counts), git_branch (returns current branch name). GitStatus.tsx component in status bar showing branch name + dirty file count. TypeScript wrappers in ipc.ts. Polls on workspace change.

tasks.title: Add Markdown Rendering in Agent Chat
tasks.description: Replace raw <pre> text in AgentPanel with a MessageRenderer component using react-markdown. Code blocks rendered with language headers, inline code styled with accent color, headers/lists/links/blockquotes all rendered properly. Dramatically improves readability of agent responses.
